mapper.select: SELECT nickname FROM app_user WHERE id=#{userId} AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT FROM post p LEFT JOIN circle c ON c.id=p.circle_id WHERE p.id=#{postId} AND p.user_id=#{userId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT FROM post p LEFT JOIN circle c ON c.id=p.circle_id WHERE p.id=#{postId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT url FROM post_image WHERE post_id=#{postId} ORDER BY sort_no,id
SELECT t.name FROM post_topic pt JOIN topic t ON t.id=pt.topic_id WHERE pt.post_id=#{postId} AND t.status=1 AND t.merged_to_id IS NULL ORDER BY pt.id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post WHERE region=#{region} AND audit_status=1 AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post p JOIN user_follow f ON f.followed_user_id=p.user_id WHERE f.follower_user_id=#{userId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE

SELECT FROM post p JOIN user_follow f ON f.followed_user_id=p.user_id LEFT JOIN circle c ON c.id=p.circle_id WHERE f.follower_user_id=#{userId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE ORDER BY p.created_at DESC,p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post p WHERE p.circle_id=#{circleId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_topic pt JOIN post p ON p.id=pt.post_id WHERE pt.topic_id=#{topicId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE

SELECT FROM post_topic pt JOIN post p ON p.id=pt.post_id LEFT JOIN circle c ON c.id=p.circle_id WHERE pt.topic_id=#{topicId} AND p.region=#{region} AND p.audit_status=1 AND p.status=1 AND p.is_deleted=FALSE ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET circle_id=#{circleId},title=#{title},content=#{content},content_type=#{contentType},shop_id=#{shopId},deal_id=#{dealId}, audit_status=0,audit_remark='',status=1,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{id} AND user_id=#{userId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE
UPDATE post SET is_deleted=TRUE,status=0,updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{postId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like WHERE post_id=#{postId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_like WHERE post_id=#{postId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like WHERE post_id=#{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET like_count=(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_like WHERE post_id=#{postId}) WHERE id=#{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id=#{postId} AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE
SELECT id,post_id,user_id,user_name,content,created_at FROM post_comment WHERE post_id=#{postId} AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET comment_count=(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id=#{postId} AND status=1 AND is_deleted=FALSE) WHERE id=#{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT id,post_id,reporter_user_id,reporter_user_name,reason,status,created_at FROM post_report WHERE post_id=#{postId} AND reporter_user_id=#{userId} AND is_deleted=FALSE LIMIT 1
